nasb.text: Seek good and not evil, that you may live; And thus may the Lord God of hosts be with you, Just as you have said!

esv.text: Seek good, and not evil, that you may live; and so the Lord, the God of hosts, will be with you, as you have said.

cnv.text: 你們要尋求良善，不要尋求邪惡， 這樣才可以存活。 耶和華萬軍的　神就必與你們同在， 正如你們所說的。

ccb.text: 你们要弃恶从善，才能存活。 这样，万军之上帝耶和华必与你们同在， 正如你们所说的。
